definition: actuator/valve accessory comprising a regulator that is used to control the supply pressure to the valve actuator and its auxiliaries

definition_ml.en: actuator/valve accessory comprising a regulator that is used to control the supply pressure to the valve actuator and its auxiliaries
definition_ml.de: Zubehör für Ventile/Antriebe, das eine Regeleinheit umfasst und benutzt wird, um den Versorgungsdruck für den Ventilantrieb und dessen Hilfseinrichtungen zu regeln

note: In ANSI/ISA 75.05.01-2000 a filter regulator is called an air set.

note_ml.en: In ANSI/ISA 75.05.01-2000 a filter regulator is called an air set.

raw_properties.MDC_P008.en: In ANSI/ISA 75.05.01-2000 a filter regulator is called an air set.
